2605.10253.title: Knowledge Poisoning Attacks on Medical Multi-Modal Retrieval-Augmented Generation
2605.10253.paper_summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is a widely adopted paradigm for enhancing LLMs in medical applications by incorporating expert multimodal knowledge during generation. However, the underlying retrieval databases may naturally contain, or be intentionally injected with, adversarial knowledge, which can perturb model outputs and undermine system reliability. To investigate this risk, prior studies have explored knowledge poisoning attacks in medical RAG systems. Nevertheless, most of them rely on the strong assumption that adversaries possess prior knowledge of user queries, which is unrealistic in deployments and substantially limits their practical applicability. In this paper, we propose M\textsuperscript{3}Att, a knowledge-poisoning framework designed for medical multimodal RAG systems, assuming only limited distribution knowledge of the underlying database. Our core idea is to inject covert misinformation into textual data while using paired visual data as a query-agnostic trigger to promote retrieval. We first propose a unified framework that introduces imperceptible perturbations to visual inputs to manipulate retrieval probabilities. Besides, due to the prior medical knowledge in LLMs, naively poisoned medical content with explicit factual errors can be corrected during generation. Thus, we leverage the inherent ambiguity of medical diagnosis and design a covert misinformation injection strategy that degrades diagnostic accuracy while evading model self-correction. Experiments on five LLMs and datasets demonstrate that M\textsuperscript{3}Att consistently produces clinically plausible yet incorrect generations. Codes: https://github.com/ypr17/M3Att.
2605.10253.paper_summary_zh: 檢索增強生成（RAG）是一種廣泛採用的範式，用於通過在生成過程中融入專家多模態知識來增強醫療應用中的大型語言模型（LLMs）。然而，基礎的檢索數據庫可能自然地包含或被故意注入對抗性知識，這可能會擾動模型輸出並削弱系統的可靠性。為了調查這一風險，先前的研究已經探討了醫療 RAG 系統中的知識中毒攻擊。然而，它們大多依賴於對手擁有用戶查詢的先驗知識這一強假設，這在實際部署中是不現實的，並大大限制了它們的實用性。在本文中，我們提出了 M\textsuperscript{3}Att，一個專為醫療多模態 RAG 系統設計的知識中毒框架，僅假設對基礎數據庫的有限分佈知識。我們的核心思想是在文本數據中注入隱蔽的虛假信息，同時使用配對的視覺數據作為與查詢無關的觸發器來促進檢索。我們首先提出了一個統一框架，對視覺輸入引入不可察覺的擾動，以操控檢索概率。此外，由於 LLM 中的先驗醫療知識，帶有明確事實錯誤的天真中毒醫療內容可以在生成過程中被修正。因此，我們利用醫療診斷的固有模糊性，設計了一種隱蔽的虛假信息注入策略，該策略降低了診斷準確性，同時避開模型自我修正。對五個 LLM 和數據集的實驗表明，M\textsuperscript{3}Att 始終產生臨床上合理但不正確的生成結果。代碼：https://github.com/ypr17/M3Att。
2605.10253.author: Peiru Yang et.al.
2605.10253.authors: Peiru Yang, Haoran Zheng, Tong Ju, Shiting Wang, Wanchun Ni, Jiajun Liu, Shangguang Wang, Yongfeng Huang, Tao Qi
